primary_display.name: Gmarket Sans
primary_display.license: SIL Open Font License (free commercial + non-commercial)
primary_display.design_intent: geometric forms within square boundaries; aligned for accessibility across print/web/mobile

primary_text_stack.css: -apple-system, system-ui, "Apple SD Gothic Neo", Roboto, "Noto Sans CJK KR", Tahoma, "Noto Sans Korean", "Noto Sans KR", "Gmarket Sans", sans-serif
primary_text_stack.rationale: Apple SD Gothic Neo first on macOS/iOS; Noto Sans KR fallback; Gmarket Sans reserved for display moments (section H2, banner copy, logo)
primary_text_stack.observed_in_body: 146/272 sampled elements used the system stack
primary_text_stack.observed_in_display: 19/272 sampled elements used pure Gmarket Sans

tier1_evidence: https://corp.gmarket.com/fonts/ — first-party distribution page with SIL OFL
